description_long: This is a modern, freestanding shelving unit with a dark, wood-like finish. The structure features two vertical supports with three open shelves on each side, separated by a central divider, creating a symmetrical, grid-like appearance. The lower section consists of a wide, rectangular cabinet base with two visible circular cutouts, likely for handles or finger pulls, suggesting the presence of drawers or doors. The legs are short and slightly inset, giving the unit a stable yet elevated stance. The overall design is minimalist and functional, suitable for urban interiors such as lofts, offices, or communal spaces. The surfaces appear smooth and hard, with a matte to semi-matte finish, and the color is a deep, rich brown.
description: A modern, dark wood-finished shelving unit with open shelves and a wide cabinet base, featuring minimalist design and short legs. The structure is symmetrical and functional, ideal for urban interiors.
description_view_0: Side view showing the depth and thickness of the shelving unit, with the cabinet base and shelves aligned vertically.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the symmetrical arrangement of open shelves and the wide cabinet base with two circular cutouts.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, similar to view 0, highlighting the depth and solid construction of the unit.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the back of the shelves and cabinet, with no visible openings or handles.
